imunoterapie.name: Atezolizumab (Tecentriq)
imunoterapie.administration: first dose over 60 minutes, subsequent over 30 minutes

imunoterapie.name: Atezolizumab (Tecentriq)
imunoterapie.administration: first dose over 60 minutes, subsequent over 30 minutes

imunoterapie.name: Atezolizumab (Tecentriq)
imunoterapie.administration: first dose over 60 minutes, subsequent over 30 minutes

imunoterapie.name: Atezolizumab SC (Tecentriq SC)
imunoterapie.administration: 1875 mg s.c. into abdomen or thigh over 7-10 min (fixed dose)
imunoterapie.premedication: No routine premedication required. SC formulation does not require prolonged monitoring as compared to i.v.
imunoterapie.source: SmPC Tecentriq SC 2023. Indications: same as i.v. atezolizumab.

imunoterapie.name: Avelumab (Bavencio)
imunoterapie.premedication: levocetirizine 5mg and paracetamol 500mg or ibuprofen 400mg before each infusion.

imunoterapie.name: Durvalumab (Imfinzi)
imunoterapie.regimen name: Durvalumab 3 weekly with carboplatin and paclitaxel

imunoterapie.name: Ipilimumab + Nivolumab
imunoterapie.regimen name: Ipi 3mg/kg + Nivo 1mg/kg q3w × 4, then Nivo 240mg q2w (melanoma, CheckMate-067)
imunoterapie.frequency: 21 days (induction 4 cycles), then nivolumab 240 mg q2w
imunoterapie.administration: ipilimumab in 250 ml NaCl i.v./30 min, then nivolumab in 100 ml NaCl i.v./30 min. Induction: 4 cycles q3w, then nivolumab monotherapy.
imunoterapie.source: Larkin J et al. NEJM 2015;373:23 (CheckMate-067). Melanoma 1st line.

imunoterapie.name: Ipilimumab + Nivolumab
imunoterapie.regimen name: Ipi 1mg/kg + Nivo 3mg/kg q3w × 4, then Nivo 240mg q2w (NSCLC, CheckMate-227)
imunoterapie.frequency: 21 days (induction 4 cycles), then nivolumab 240 mg q2w
imunoterapie.administration: nivolumab in 100 ml NaCl i.v./30 min, then ipilimumab in 250 ml NaCl i.v./30 min. Induction: 4 cycles q3w.
imunoterapie.source: Hellmann MD et al. NEJM 2019;381:2020 (CheckMate-227). NSCLC 1st line.

imunoterapie.name: Ipilimumab + Nivolumab
imunoterapie.regimen name: Ipi 1mg/kg q6w + Nivo 360mg q3w (NSCLC CheckMate-9LA; various indications)
imunoterapie.dosage: 1 mg/kg (ipi q6w) + 360 mg (nivo q3w, flat dose)
imunoterapie.administration: nivolumab 360 mg flat i.v./30 min q3w + ipilimumab 1 mg/kg i.v./30 min q6w.
imunoterapie.source: Reck M et al. Lancet 2021;397:1345 (CheckMate-9LA). NSCLC, HCC, and other indications.

imunoterapie.name: Ipilimumab + Nivolumab
imunoterapie.regimen name: Ipi 1mg/kg + Nivo 3mg/kg q3w × 4, then Nivo 480mg q4w (mRCC, CheckMate-214)
imunoterapie.frequency: 21 days (induction 4 cycles), then nivolumab 480 mg q4w
imunoterapie.administration: nivolumab in 100 ml NaCl i.v./30 min, then ipilimumab in 250 ml NaCl i.v./30 min. Maintenance: nivolumab 480 mg q4w.
imunoterapie.source: Motzer RJ et al. NEJM 2018;378:1277 (CheckMate-214). mRCC 1st line.

imunoterapie.name: Ipilimumab + Nivolumab
imunoterapie.administration: ipilimumab in 250 ml NaCl i.v./90 min. Max 4 doses.
imunoterapie.source: Eggermont AMM et al. NEJM 2016;375:1845 (EORTC 18071). Adjuvant melanoma stage III.

imunoterapie.name: Relatlimab + Nivolumab (Opdualag)
imunoterapie.administration: Relatlimab 160 mg + Nivolumab 480 mg co-formulated, i.v. over 30 min
imunoterapie.source: Tawbi HA et al. NEJM 2022;386:24 (RELATIVITY-047); SmPC Opdualag. Indication: melanoma (unresectable/metastatic, 1st line)

imunoterapie.name: Nivolumab SC
imunoterapie.source: SmPC Opdivo SC 2024. Same indications as i.v. formulations.

imunoterapie.name: Ipilimumab (HIMALAYA – STRIDE)
imunoterapie.regimen name: Tremelimumab 300mg D1 + Durvalumab 1500mg flat q4w (HCC, HIMALAYA)
imunoterapie.dosage: Tremelimumab 300 mg single dose + Durvalumab 1500 mg flat
imunoterapie.administration: Tremelimumab 300 mg i.v. D1, then durvalumab 1500 mg flat i.v./60 min q4w (STRIDE regimen).
imunoterapie.source: Abou-Alfa GK et al. NEJM Evid 2022;1 (HIMALAYA). HCC 1st line.
